'''panate''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Adverbs|adverb]] meaning "[[Wikt:zenithwards|zenithwards]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| p-n-s
|-
! Word class
| [[Adverb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:zenithwards|zenithwards]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| panate
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Form !! Surface form
|-
| [[positive]].[[present]] || [[word:panate|panate]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[mythic]] || [[word:panatesher|panatesher]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[mythic]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:panatesherĂ«m|panatesherĂ«m]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[past]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:panatero|panatero]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:panateshĂ«|panateshĂ«]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:panateshĂ«m|panateshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hesternal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokipanatero|gokipanatero]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hesternal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokipanateshĂ«|gokipanateshĂ«]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hesternal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokipanateshĂ«m|gokipanateshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gopanankerom|gopanankerom]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gopanankeshĂ«|gopanankeshĂ«]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gopanankeshĂ«m|gopanankeshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:gopanankeya|gopanankeya]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[future]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:panaterom|panaterom]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[future]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:panatemu|panatemu]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[future]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:panateya|panateya]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[crastinal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokipanaterom|gokipanaterom]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[crastinal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokipanatemu|gokipanatemu]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[crastinal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:gokipanateya|gokipanateya]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[present]] || [[word:pananate|pananate]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[mythic]] || [[word:pananatesher|pananatesher]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[mythic]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:pananatesherĂ«m|pananatesherĂ«m]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[past]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:pananatero|pananatero]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:pananateshĂ«|pananateshĂ«]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:pananateshĂ«m|pananateshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hesternal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokipananatero|gokipananatero]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hesternal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokipananateshĂ«|gokipananateshĂ«]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hesternal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokipananateshĂ«m|gokipananateshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gopananankerom|gopananankerom]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gopananankeshĂ«|gopananankeshĂ«]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gopananankeshĂ«m|gopananankeshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:gopananankeya|gopananankeya]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[future]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:pananaterom|pananaterom]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[future]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:pananatemu|pananatemu]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[future]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:pananateya|pananateya]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[crastinal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokipananaterom|gokipananaterom]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[crastinal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokipananatemu|gokipananatemu]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[crastinal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:gokipananateya|gokipananateya]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[present]] || [[word:pĂŠnĂŠte|pĂŠnĂŠte]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[mythic]] || [[word:pĂŠnĂŠtesher|pĂŠnĂŠtesher]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[mythic]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:pĂŠnĂŠtesherĂ«m|pĂŠnĂŠtesherĂ«m]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[past]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:pĂŠnĂŠtero|pĂŠnĂŠtero]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:pĂŠnĂŠteshĂ«|pĂŠnĂŠteshĂ«]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:pĂŠnĂŠteshĂ«m|pĂŠnĂŠteshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hesternal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokipĂŠnĂŠtero|gokipĂŠnĂŠtero]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hesternal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokipĂŠnĂŠteshĂ«|gokipĂŠnĂŠteshĂ«]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hesternal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokipĂŠnĂŠteshĂ«m|gokipĂŠnĂŠteshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gopĂŠnĂŠnkerom|gopĂŠnĂŠnkerom]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gopĂŠnĂŠnkeshĂ«|gopĂŠnĂŠnkeshĂ«]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gopĂŠnĂŠnkeshĂ«m|gopĂŠnĂŠnkeshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:gopĂŠnĂŠnkeya|gopĂŠnĂŠnkeya]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[future]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:pĂŠnĂŠterom|pĂŠnĂŠterom]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[future]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:pĂŠnĂŠtemu|pĂŠnĂŠtemu]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[future]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:pĂŠnĂŠteya|pĂŠnĂŠteya]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[crastinal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokipĂŠnĂŠterom|gokipĂŠnĂŠterom]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[crastinal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokipĂŠnĂŠtemu|gokipĂŠnĂŠtemu]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[crastinal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:gokipĂŠnĂŠteya|gokipĂŠnĂŠteya]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[present]] || [[word:pafnafte|pafnafte]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[mythic]] || [[word:pafnaftesher|pafnaftesher]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[mythic]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:pafnaftesherĂ«m|pafnaftesherĂ«m]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[past]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:pafnaftero|pafnaftero]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:pafnafteshĂ«|pafnafteshĂ«]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:pafnafteshĂ«m|pafnafteshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hesternal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokipafnaftero|gokipafnaftero]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hesternal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokipafnafteshĂ«|gokipafnafteshĂ«]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hesternal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokipafnafteshĂ«m|gokipafnafteshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gopafnafnkerom|gopafnafnkerom]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gopafnafnkeshĂ«|gopafnafnkeshĂ«]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gopafnafnkeshĂ«m|gopafnafnkeshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:gopafnafnkeya|gopafnafnkeya]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[future]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:pafnafterom|pafnafterom]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[future]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:pafnaftemu|pafnaftemu]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[future]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:pafnafteya|pafnafteya]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[crastinal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokipafnafterom|gokipafnafterom]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[crastinal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokipafnaftemu|gokipafnaftemu]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[crastinal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:gokipafnafteya|gokipafnafteya]]
|}

''76 forms generated.''

== See also ==
